title: Your presence is heaven (feat. israel houghton)
html: Intro: G C F C Who is like You Lord in all the earth? C F C Matchless love and beauty, endless worth C F C Nothing in this world will satisfy C F C Jesus You're the cup that won't run dry G F C Your presence is heaven to me G F C Your presence is heaven to me G F C Treasure of my heart and of my soul C F C In my weakness you are merciful C F C Redeemer of my past and present wrongs C F C Holder of my future days to come G F C Your presence is heaven to me G F C Your presence is heaven to me G F C Your presence is heaven to me!! G F F Your presence is heaven to me!!!! C Am G Oh Jesus, Oh Jesus F Your presence is heaven to me C Am G Oh Jesus, Oh Jesus F Your presence is heaven to me C F C All my days on earth I will await C F C The moment that I see You face to face C F C Nothing in this world will satisfy C F C 'Cause Jesus You're the cup that won't run dry C F C Nothing in this world will satisfy C F C Jesus You're the cup that won't run dry C F C Jesus You're the cup that won't run dry!!!! G F C Your presence is heaven to me! G F C Your presence is heaven to me! G F C Your presence is heaven to me! G F C Your presence is heaven to me!! C Am G Oh Jesus, Oh Jesus F Your presence is heaven to me C Am G Oh Jesus, Oh Jesus F Your presence is heaven to me
